name: Cajun Spice - Ornish
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Ground cumin (or whole seeds toasted and ground)
1 tbsp Ground coriander (or whole seeds toasted and ground)
1/2 tbsp Ground fenugreek (or whole seeds toasted and ground)
1/2 tbsp Ground fennel (or whole seeds toasted and ground)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Pulse the mixture for 30 seconds or until finely ground.
3. Transfer to an airtight container and store in a cool place.
4. Use within 3 months.
Note: This blend has a much more vibrant flavor than pre-made grocery spices. It is best when using fresh ingredients.
Serving size: 1 tablespoon
21 calories
0.6 gram fat
0 mg cholesterol
296 mg sodium
